channel.title: LLM Timeline — Shanghai AI Laboratory/CUHK Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Shanghai AI Laboratory/CUHK.

image.title: LLM Timeline — Shanghai AI Laboratory/CUHK Models

item.title: Meta-Transformer (Shanghai AI Laboratory/CUHK)
item.description: Parameters: Meta-Transformer License: open Type: model Proto-AGI. 12 modalities (text, image, point cloud, audio, video, infrared, hyperspectral, X-ray, time-series, tabular, Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), and graph data).
